Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Steven S. Miyake; 415-421-4400; appearing in person on behalf of petitioner Suzie Danbury.

No other appearances. Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR JUDGMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SUZIE DANBURY'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Judgment is Transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at the same time. That department handles all cases arising out of the ownership of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
